rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Orders Directing Receiver: 1) Pay State Annual Licensing Renewal Fees For L.L.C.S In Receivership; 2) Pay Appeal Court Costs From Receivership Funds As They Become Due To The Court; 3) Produce Copies Of Escrow Files From The Sales Of Receivership Properties
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 25, 2022 line 1. DEFENDANT CHRISTINE MWANGI Notice Of Motion For Orders Directing Receiver: 1) Pay State Annual Licensing Renewal Fees For L.L.C.S In Receivership; 2) Pay Appeal Court Costs From Receivership Funds As They Become Due To The Court; 3) Produce Copies Of Escrow Files From The Sales Of Receivership Properties Hearing Required. No later than 9:00 a.m. on March 29, 2022 Receiver to file a declaration stating in clear and concise manner: (1) the total amount of cash on hand in the receivership estate as on March 29, 2022; (2) current monthly operating expenses, excluding the costs of receivership, attorney's fees, but including insurance, taxes, utilities, security, mortgage, etc.; (3) current monthly rental income; (4) estimated monthly rental income through December 31, 2022; (5) specifying any amounts earmarked for specific expenses/claims, e.g. seismic retrofit, amounts in dispute held pending resolution of appeals, etc; (6) stating the amount, if any, not necessary for operation and management of the properties per the Injunction/Receivership order after payment of monthly receivership expenses, including receiver and attorney's fees. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: REY P. IBAY ET AL VS. RODOLFO P. IBAY JR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Expungement Of: A) Notice Of Pendency Of Action; B) Notice Of Entry Of Judgment Or Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 25, 2022 line 2. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
